calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 3, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Laurel Adams, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Colonial Pacific Leasing. The Court notes for the record that default was entered against Soma Living, Inc. on February 7, 2003. The Court accepts Declaration of Cherie Lausche, in lieu of live testimony. The Court receives evidence, and good cause appearing grants judgment as follows: Principal: $48,386.76, Interest: $1,749.00, Fees: $2,010.00, Costs: $301.00 for a total judgment of $52,446.76. Order signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2003 Continued To May-30-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
